message:
Hoist per-call constants and helpers to module scope

- Hoist STATUS_MAP → FEED_STATUS array (was recreated per createParser call)
- Hoist CLASSIFY_* constants (was recreated per parse call)
- Hoist tryDocParse helper (was recreated per parse call, only depends on engine)
- index.ts 870→867 lines (-3 net, cleaner parse() body)
